title: How to Develop and Write a Grant Proposal (CRS Report RL32159)
display_label: How to Develop and Write a Grant Proposal (CRS RL32159)
content: Congressional Research Service (CRS) report RL32159, 'How to Develop and Write a Grant Proposal'. Distributed by ORA as a companion resource to Tracy Rone's 2023-02-27 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Strategies for Grant Proposal Development'. Authoritative federal guide on the structure and content of competitive grant proposals.
